false_positive_risks: the public Silo/Cantina report treated this as Low/Informational because the scenario depended on economically unlikely 1 wei collateral representing meaningful value and no working PoC was produced
native collateral minting unavailability is an asset-configuration limitation while redemption remains available; no direct theft path is shown
address(0) blacklist interaction is a configuration edge case that blocks burns rather than enabling unauthorized asset extraction

scorecard.title: external report sweep smoke: stale solvency transfer

validation_recipe.goal: 用当前目标仓库证明 reachability、权限边界、状态变化和影响，而不是只证明历史相似
minimum_assertions: 当前代码路径可由有效攻击者或普通用户触发
关键状态变量或资产余额出现可观测错误变化
影响不是仅由 trusted-role misconfiguration、用户误操作或 unsupported token 触发
若作为 HM，PoC 或状态推演能支撑 C4 severity
